chapter_title: Admin. Suspension of Driver's License for Failure to Pass Test for Intoxication
text:
(a) To obtain a transcript of an administrative hearing, the party who appeals the administrative law judge’s decision must apply to the State Office of Administrative Hearings.

(b) On payment of a fee not to exceed the actual cost of preparing the transcript, the State Office of Administrative Hearings shall promptly furnish both parties with a transcript of the administrative hearing.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 524. Admin. Suspension of Driver's License for Failure to Pass Test for Intoxication
##### § 524.044 — Transcript of Administrative Hearing

(a) To obtain a transcript of an administrative hearing, the party who appeals the administrative law judge’s decision must apply to the State Office of Administrative Hearings.

(b) On payment of a fee not to exceed the actual cost of preparing the transcript, the State Office of Administrative Hearings shall promptly furnish both parties with a transcript of the administrative hearing.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: To obtain a transcript of an administrative hearing, the party who appeals the administrative law judge’s decision must apply to the State Office of Administrative Hearings.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: On payment of a fee not to exceed the actual cost of preparing the transcript, the State Office of Administrative Hearings shall promptly furnish both parties with a transcript of the administrative hearing.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
